This repo distills best practices, patterns, and examples for integrating Claude Code into your terminal-based coding environment. Claude Code is a command-line tool that gives you direct access to Claude’s reasoning and coding capabilities. It’s designed for agentic coding - where Claude autonomously explores, edits, and explains code across your project. Think of it as a collaborative AI pair programmer that understands your repo structure, coding conventions, and workflows. + How to configure your environment for Claude Code. title: 💻 Claude Code Security Best Practices
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Claude Code Security Best Practices. Claude Code is a popular agentic coding assistant designed by Anthropic to run in a developer’s terminal, offering deep codebase analysis, code generation, project planning, and automation through natural language prompts. ## **Why Claude Code Security Matters**. When AI becomes part of your coding environment, the IDE is no longer “just a text editor.” It’s an insider with:. * **The ability to run commands**. That’s not just convenience — it’s risk. A single poisoned prompt or misconfigured setting can turn Claude Code from your coding partner into a threat actor. This blog is your guide to staying safe: how to configure Claude Code, what traps to avoid, and how to combine internal and external defenses. Every time it runs a command or reads a file, it’s acting with your permissions. ## **The Heart of Security: `managed-settings.json`**. Like most AI coders, Claude Code has a variety of configuration settings for security. Claude Code’s security settings live here:.

title: 💻 Mastering the Vibe: Claude Code Best Practices That Actually Work | by Dinanjana Gunaratne | Medium
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

*How I went from fumbling with AI-generated spaghetti code to building production-ready apps with Claude Code*. Three months ago, I was that developer who would throw a vague prompt at Claude Code, cross my fingers, and hope for the best. If you’re ready to move beyond the “ask and pray” approach to something that actually works consistently, here’s what I’ve learned about making Claude Code genuinely useful. Think of it as Claude’s memory bank for your project. This isn’t just configuration — it’s how you teach Claude to understand your specific codebase, conventions, and quirks. The magic isn’t in the format — there’s no required format for CLAUDE.md files — it’s in being specific about what matters for *your* project. But the real power comes from asking Claude to make a plan before coding and explicitly telling it not to code until you’ve confirmed that its plan looks good.

title: 💻 What Is Claude Code /simplify and /batch? The Built-In Commands That Fix Overengineering | MindStudio
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# What Is Claude Code /simplify and /batch? Claude Code's /simplify and /batch commands help you clean up bloated code and run large refactors in parallel. Claude Code tackles this with two commands worth knowing: `/simplify` and `/batch`. The `/batch` command lets you run operations across multiple files simultaneously, so large refactors don’t require running the same prompt over and over. Here’s how both work and when to use them. ## What Claude Code Is. Claude Code is Anthropic’s terminal-based AI coding assistant. It connects to your codebase through the file system, which means it can see the actual state of your project rather than relying on what you paste into a chat window. Instead of writing a long prompt explaining what you want, you type a command and Claude handles the task with the right behavior built in. When you run `/simplify` on a file or function, Claude Code evaluates:.

title: 💻 Claude Code Batch Processing #Linux - Qiita
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Claude Code Batch Processing. Claude Code users often face the challenge of "wanting to execute multiple prompts sequentially" and "automating code generation with overnight batch processing." Many also need "project-specific prompt management" for their development workflows. This article provides a detailed explanation of the batch processing features added in Prompt Scheduler v1.0.2, along with real development scenarios. I want to clearly state that this is an independent personal development project with no connection whatsoever to Anthropic's Claude or Claude Code. Batch processing in Prompt Scheduler refers to **the functionality of pre-defining multiple prompts and automatically executing them in a specified order**. * Continuous prompt execution in active development projects. # Overnight batch (aggressive execution ignoring limits) \ --prompt-file \ --mode \ --ignore-approaching-limit \ --hours # Phased execution during business hours \ --prompt-file \ --mode \ --stop-at. * **Project management**: Parallel processing of multiple projects with `--prompt-file`. * **Limit processing**: Aggressive execution with `--ignore-approaching-limit`.

Use when the user wants to create one or many images from data (CSV/list), reuse a visual template with different texts/photos, or batch-produce cards for a marketplace, social network, or event. Manages Discord operations including messaging, reactions, and channel management directly through Claude. Browse the MCP Market to get started. The Batch Processing skill for Claude Code empowers developers to handle high-volume tasks—such as reviewing dozens of files or processing hundreds of documents—without linear increases in time or token costs. It provides a strategic framework for selecting the optimal execution method based on scale: utilizing agent swarms for rapid parallel processing of 5-20 items, the Anthropic API Batch for 50% cost savings on massive datasets, or sequential loops for tasks with complex dependencies. Sync skills to **Claude Cowork**, **Claude Code**, **Codex**, and more.

* /batch Command: Parallel Execution of Large-Scale Code Changes. * Headless Mode (claude -p): CI/CD and Script Integration. # Claude Code Batch Processing Complete Guide: /batch Command and Headless Mode in Practice¶. The `/batch` command in Claude Code shines when you need to apply the same transformation across hundreds of files. * The `/batch` command executes codebase-wide migrations safely using **parallel agents + Git Worktree** isolation. * Headless mode (`claude -p`) provides **non-interactive integration** for CI/CD pipelines and shell scripts. Intermediate to advanced Claude Code users looking to scale up with large-scale changes and CI/CD integration. The latter is a non-interactive execution mode for embedding AI processing into CI/CD pipelines. | Aspect | /batch Command | Headless Mode (claude -p) |. Choose headless mode when embedding AI processing into existing CI/CD pipelines. `/batch` is a slash command executed within an interactive Claude Code session1. ## Headless Mode (claude -p): CI/CD and Script Integration¶.
